text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, June 14. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Let's break this down. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Managing some allergy issues today. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that updating our financial spreadsheets. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Here is what I recommend. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
